title: Problems, Advice and Decisions: Vocabulary Lesson 2 - Interactive Practice
instructions: Complete the word ordering task. Use the lesson examples for support.

items.prompt: Choose the best sentence using relative clauses.
options: Correct use of relative clauses in a B1 sentence.
Incorrect word order with relative clauses.
items.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses relative clauses accurately.
items.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of relative clauses.

items.prompt: Match the relationships phrase to its meaning.
items.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
items.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

items.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
items.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand relationships.
items.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
items.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.
